description_long: This is a pair of mid-century modern armchairs, each featuring a boxy silhouette with wide, flared armrests and angled wooden legs. The left chair appears relatively clean, with a light beige upholstery and a backrest adorned with four square tufted buttons. The right chair is heavily soiled and stained, with significant discoloration and visible wear on both the seat and backrest, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure or neglect. Both chairs have thick, padded seat and back cushions, with the cushions appearing slightly loose and not fully integrated into the frame. The armrests are wide and padded, extending outward in a gentle flare, and the legs are short, splayed, and metallic with a brass-like finish. The overall appearance is that of well-used, possibly discarded furniture, suitable for an urban street or alleyway setting.
description: A pair of vintage armchairs with flared armrests, angled brass legs, and thick, padded cushions; one chair is clean and beige, the other is heavily stained and worn.
description_view_0: Front view showing both chairs side by side, highlighting the clean beige upholstery and tufted backrest on the left chair, and the stained, damaged surfaces on the right chair.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the seat cushions, the pronounced flaring of the armrests, and the contrast between the clean and soiled upholstery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned backs of both chairs, with the left chair appearing cleaner and the right chair showing discoloration and stains.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thickness of the cushions, the outward flare of the armrests, and the difference in surface condition between the two chairs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each chair has one thick, loose seat cushion and one loose back cushion; the back cushion on the left chair is tufted with four buttons, while the right chair's cushions are stained and misshapen.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests with a flared, outward-angled profile; armrests are at seat height and fully upholstered, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Each chair has four short, splayed legs positioned at the corners; legs are metallic with a brass-like finish and are exposed beneath the frame.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest with a rectangular shape; the left chair features a tufted back cushion, while the right chair's backrest is plain and heavily stained.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is primarily solid beige with a smooth, matte texture; the left chair has tufted button detailing on the back cushion, while the right chair's fabric is stained and discolored with no visible pattern.
